Operation 'getSo2' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks clarity on required input parameters (city identifier format), output structure, and data scope. Added specificity about what constitutes the input, what the response contains, and contextual information about data aggregation across monitoring stations to improve AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Get SO2 data for a city
data.current_description: Returns sulfur dioxide (SO2) readings for a specified city.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves sulfur dioxide (SO2) pollutant readings for a specified city. Requires city name or code as input parameter. Returns SO2 concentration values and timestamp from the most recent monitoring data. Part of the Pollutants data category providing individual pollutant readings across all monitoring stations in the city.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on required input parameters (city identifier format), output structure, and data scope. Added specificity about what constitutes the input, what the response contains, and contextual information about data aggregation across monitoring stations to improve AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getStationData' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is vague about what 'all air quality data' includes and doesn't specify the response structure. Added explicit list of pollutants returned and clarified that this provides station-level granularity, helping AI agents understand when to use station-level vs. city-level endpoints.

data.current_summary: Get data for a monitoring station
data.current_description: Returns all air quality data for a specific monitoring station identified by its station code.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive air quality data for a specific monitoring station using its station code identifier. Returns detailed AQI readings including PM2.5, PM10, CO, NO2, O3, and SO2 concentrations along with timestamp. Station-level data provides granular geographic precision compared to city-level aggregates.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about what 'all air quality data' includes and doesn't specify the response structure. Added explicit list of pollutants returned and clarified that this provides station-level granularity, helping AI agents understand when to use station-level vs. city-level endpoints.

message: Operation 'getAllCities' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is too generic ('Get all cities data'). Description lacks input parameter details and output structure information. Added clarification about response format options, performance implications, and use cases to help AI agents determine when this expensive operation is appropriate versus more targeted alternatives.

data.current_summary: Get all cities data
data.current_description: Returns air quality data for all cities in China. Warning: returns a very large response.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve air quality data for all Chinese cities
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves air quality data for all cities across China in a single request. Returns simplified or detailed AQI records for each city depending on parameters. Warning: produces a very large response payload - consider using city-specific or ranking endpoints for targeted queries. Useful for comprehensive national air quality assessment or bulk data analysis.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic ('Get all cities data'). Description lacks input parameter details and output structure information. Added clarification about response format options, performance implications, and use cases to help AI agents determine when this expensive operation is appropriate versus more targeted alternatives.

message: Operation 'getAqiRanking' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks clarity on output structure (what fields are included in ranking records) and sorting behavior. Missing input parameter details about sort order. Added specificity about response content and use cases to help AI agents understand when ranking data is more appropriate than raw city data.

data.current_summary: Get AQI city ranking
data.current_description: Returns a ranking of all Chinese cities sorted by their AQI values.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a ranked list of all Chinese cities sorted by Air Quality Index (AQI) values. Returns ranking records containing city name, AQI value, and air quality status. Sorting order (ascending/descending) depends on parameters. Useful for identifying cities with worst or best air quality conditions at a glance.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on output structure (what fields are included in ranking records) and sorting behavior. Missing input parameter details about sort order. Added specificity about response content and use cases to help AI agents understand when ranking data is more appropriate than raw city data.

message: Operation 'getCityAqi' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about input requirements (city parameter format/requirements) and output structure. Added specificity about what SimplifiedAqiRecord contains and use case context for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Get simplified city AQI data
data.current_description: Returns simplified AQI data for all monitoring stations in a specified city.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves simplified air quality index (AQI) data aggregated from all monitoring stations in a specified city. Returns a SimplifiedAqiRecord containing AQI value, primary pollutant, and city-level air quality status. Useful for quick air quality assessment without detailed pollutant breakdowns.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about input requirements (city parameter format/requirements) and output structure. Added specificity about what SimplifiedAqiRecord contains and use case context for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getCityAqiDetails' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about input parameters and output structure. Enhanced with specific pollutant types returned and clarification that it includes both aggregated and station-level data, enabling AI agents to choose between simplified vs. detailed endpoints.

data.current_summary: Get detailed city AQI data
data.current_description: Returns detailed air quality data for all monitoring stations in a specified city, including all pollutant readings.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive air quality data aggregated from all monitoring stations in a specified city. Returns a DetailedAqiRecord containing AQI, PM2.5, PM10, CO, NO2, O3, SO2 readings, and individual station data. Provides complete pollutant analysis for thorough air quality assessment.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about input parameters and output structure. Enhanced with specific pollutant types returned and clarification that it includes both aggregated and station-level data, enabling AI agents to choose between simplified vs. detailed endpoints.

message: Operation 'getPm25' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing details about input parameter requirements and output structure. Added clarity about return type (PollutantRecord) and use case context to help AI agents understand when to call this vs. other pollutant endpoints.

data.current_summary: Get PM2.5 data for a city
data.current_description: Returns PM2.5 (particulate matter <= 2.5 micrometers) readings for a specified city.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves PM2.5 (fine particulate matter ≤2.5 micrometers) readings from all monitoring stations in a specified city. Returns a PollutantRecord containing PM2.5 concentrations and measurement metadata. Use this endpoint for focused analysis of fine particulate pollution levels.
data.reasoning: Missing details about input parameter requirements and output structure. Added clarity about return type (PollutantRecord) and use case context to help AI agents understand when to call this vs. other pollutant endpoints.

message: Operation 'getPm10' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing input parameter details and output structure information. Enhanced with return type specification and use case context to differentiate from PM2.5 endpoint for AI agent selection.

data.current_summary: Get PM10 data for a city
data.current_description: Returns PM10 (particulate matter <= 10 micrometers) readings for a specified city.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves PM10 (coarse particulate matter ≤10 micrometers) readings from all monitoring stations in a specified city. Returns a PollutantRecord containing PM10 concentrations and measurement metadata. Use this endpoint for focused analysis of coarse particulate pollution levels.
data.reasoning: Missing input parameter details and output structure information. Enhanced with return type specification and use case context to differentiate from PM2.5 endpoint for AI agent selection.

data.reasoning: Lacks specificity about input requirements and output structure. Added return type (PollutantRecord) and clarified that data is aggregated from all monitoring stations for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Get SO2 data for a city
data.current_description: Returns sulfur dioxide (SO2) readings for a specified city.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves sulfur dioxide (SO2) pollutant readings for a specified city. Requires city name or code as input parameter. Returns SO2 concentration values and timestamp from the most recent monitoring data. Part of the Pollutants data category providing individual pollutant readings across all monitoring stations in the city.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on required input parameters (city identifier format), output structure, and data scope. Added specificity about what constitutes the input, what the response contains, and contextual information about data aggregation across monitoring stations to improve AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getStationData' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is vague about what 'all air quality data' includes and doesn't specify the response structure. Added explicit list of pollutants returned and clarified that this provides station-level granularity, helping AI agents understand when to use station-level vs. city-level endpoints.

data.current_summary: Get data for a monitoring station
data.current_description: Returns all air quality data for a specific monitoring station identified by its station code.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive air quality data for a specific monitoring station using its station code identifier. Returns detailed AQI readings including PM2.5, PM10, CO, NO2, O3, and SO2 concentrations along with timestamp. Station-level data provides granular geographic precision compared to city-level aggregates.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about what 'all air quality data' includes and doesn't specify the response structure. Added explicit list of pollutants returned and clarified that this provides station-level granularity, helping AI agents understand when to use station-level vs. city-level endpoints.

data.current_summary: Get all cities data
data.current_description: Returns air quality data for all cities in China. Warning: returns a very large response.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve air quality data for all Chinese cities
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves air quality data for all cities across China in a single request. Returns simplified or detailed AQI records for each city depending on parameters. Warning: produces a very large response payload - consider using city-specific or ranking endpoints for targeted queries. Useful for comprehensive national air quality assessment or bulk data analysis.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic ('Get all cities data'). Description lacks input parameter details and output structure information. Added clarification about response format options, performance implications, and use cases to help AI agents determine when this expensive operation is appropriate versus more targeted alternatives.

data.current_summary: Get AQI city ranking
data.current_description: Returns a ranking of all Chinese cities sorted by their AQI values.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a ranked list of all Chinese cities sorted by Air Quality Index (AQI) values. Returns ranking records containing city name, AQI value, and air quality status. Sorting order (ascending/descending) depends on parameters. Useful for identifying cities with worst or best air quality conditions at a glance.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on output structure (what fields are included in ranking records) and sorting behavior. Missing input parameter details about sort order. data.current_summary: Get simplified city AQI data
data.current_description: Returns simplified AQI data for all monitoring stations in a specified city.
